pkgmetadata.longdescription: Python implementation of the geodesic routines in GeographicLibThis is a library to solve geodesic problems on an ellipsoid model ofthe earth.Licensed under the MITX11 License see[LICENSE.txt](httpsgeographiclib.sourceforge.ioLICENSE.txt).The algorithms are documented in C. F. F. Karney, [Algorithms for geodesics](httpsdoi.org10.1007s00190-012-0578-z), J. Geodesy 87(1), 4355 (2013) [Addenda](httpsgeographiclib.sourceforge.iogeod-addenda.html).The documentation for this package is inhttpsgeographiclib.sourceforge.ioPythondoc
